<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:5-ngie̍t 5-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:5月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 5일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初五]][[zh:五月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:5-ngie̍t 5-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:5月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 5일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初五]][[zh:五月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:5-ngie̍t 5-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:5月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初五]][[zh:五月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839531]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 5th month in the Chinese lunar calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 5|qq=May 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gendoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – In the rebellion known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]], the reattempted anti-bakufu plot of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Go-Daigo]] was leaked to the Ashikaga Shogunate, resulting in the arrest of figures such as {{ill|Hino Toshiki|de|日野俊基|ja|日野俊基|zh|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. The emperor then took refuge on 【Oki Province†Oki_Province】. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out from Kyoto (from Nijō Castle) in preparation for the summer siege of Osaka. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenmei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1786|1786]] June 1) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the official [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Mogami Tokunai]] landed on Ezo (specifically, on Etoroshima, also known as Etoroshima in Oki Province). == Births == * [[:en:Jōgan|Jōgan]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:867|867]] {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Emperor Uda|Uta Tennō]], the 59th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:931|931]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1604|1604]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|de|上杉定勝|ja|上杉定勝|zh|上杉定勝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|1=Uesugi Sadakatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514762}}, the 2nd lord of the Yonezawa Domain (died [[:en:1645|1645]]). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June == Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gendoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – In the rebellion known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]], the reattempted anti-bakufu plot of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Go-Daigo]] was leaked to the Ashikaga Shogunate, resulting in the arrest of figures such as {{ill|Hino Toshiki|de|日野俊基|ja|日野俊基|zh|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. The emperor then took refuge on 【Oki Province†Oki_Province】. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out from Kyoto (from Nijō Castle) in preparation for the summer siege of Osaka. * <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:5-ngie̍t 5-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:5月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 5일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初五]][[zh:五月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:5-ngie̍t 5-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:5月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 5일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初五]][[zh:五月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:5-ngie̍t 5-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:5月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初五]][[zh:五月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839531]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 5th month in the Chinese lunar calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 5|qq=May 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gendoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – In the rebellion known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]], the reattempted anti-bakufu plot of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Go-Daigo]] was leaked to the Ashikaga Shogunate, resulting in the arrest of figures such as {{ill|Hino Toshiki|de|日野俊基|ja|日野俊基|zh|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. The emperor then took refuge on 【Oki Province†Oki_Province】. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out from Kyoto (from Nijō Castle) in preparation for the summer siege of Osaka. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenmei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1786|1786]] June 1) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the official [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Mogami Tokunai]] landed on Ezo (specifically, on Etoroshima, also known as Etoroshima in Oki Province). == Births == * [[:en:Jōgan|Jōgan]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:867|867]] {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Emperor Uda|Uta Tennō]], the 59th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:931|931]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1604|1604]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|de|上杉定勝|ja|上杉定勝|zh|上杉定勝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|1=Uesugi Sadakatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514762}}, the 2nd lord of the Yonezawa Domain (died [[:en:1645|1645]]). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Yamaguchi Sodo|de|山口素堂|ja|山口素堂|zh|山口素堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamaguchi Sodo|1=Yamaguchi Sodō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11467412}}, a haiku poet (died [[:en:1716|1716]]). * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1746|1746]] {{ill|June 23|de|June 23|ja|June 23|zh|June 23|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 23|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hanawa Hokiichi|Hanawa Hokeiichi]], a scholar of Japanese literature (died [[:en:1821|1821]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1763|1763]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Kobayashi Issa|Kobayashi Issa]], a haiku poet (died [[:en:1827|1827]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] {{ill|June 12|de|June 12|ja|June 12|zh|June 12|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 12|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takano Chōei|Takano Nagahide]], a Rangaku scholar (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Saihei Hirose|Hirose Sahei]], a businessperson (died [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Shūsaku|Honinbō Shūsaku]], a professional Go player (died [[:en:1862|1862]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] {{ill|May 31|de|May 31|ja|May 31|zh|May 31|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 31|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], vice-commander of the Shinsengumi (died [[:en:1869|1869]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hayashi Gahō|Hayashi Gahō]] (Shunsai), a Zhu Xi scholar and son of Hayashi Rinsan (born [[:en:1618|1618]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] {{ill|June 8|de|June 8|ja|June 8|zh|June 8|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Reizei Tamechika|Reisui Iguyasu]], an imperial court painter. == Commemorations == * [[:en:Dragon Boat Festival|Dragon Boat Festival]] – The Dragon Boat Festival is celebrated. * Duanwu Festival (端午節) is observed in Taiwan. <ref>{{Cite web|url=http://jp.taiwantoday.tw/news.php?unit=151&post=115869|title=TAIWAN TODAY日本語版からのお知らせ|publisher=Taiwan Today|accessdate=2017-05-26|qq=}}</ref>

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gendoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – In the rebellion known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]], the reattempted anti-bakufu plot of Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Go-Daigo]] was leaked to the Ashikaga Shogunate, resulting in the arrest of figures such as {{ill|Hino Toshiki|de|日野俊基|ja|日野俊基|zh|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. The emperor then took refuge on 【Oki Province†Oki_Province】. * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] set out from Kyoto (from Nijō Castle) in preparation for the summer siege of Osaka. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenmei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1786|1786]] June 1) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the official [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Mogami Tokunai]] landed on Ezo (specifically, on Etoroshima, also known as Etoroshima in Oki Province). == Births == * [[:en:Jōgan|Jōgan]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:867|867]] {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Emperor Uda|Uta Tennō]], the 59th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:931|931]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1604|1604]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Sadakatsu|de|上杉定勝|ja|上杉定勝|zh|上杉定勝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Sadakatsu|1=Uesugi Sadakatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8514762}}, the 2nd lord of the Yonezawa Domain (died [[:en:1645|1645]]). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Yamaguchi Sodo|de|山口素堂|ja|山口素堂|zh|山口素堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamaguchi Sodo|1=Yamaguchi Sodō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11467412}}, a haiku poet (died [[:en:1716|1716]]). * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1746|1746]] {{ill|June 23|de|June 23|ja|June 23|zh|June 23|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 23|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hanawa Hokiichi|Hanawa Hokeiichi]], a scholar of Japanese literature (died [[:en:1821|1821]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1763|1763]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Kobayashi Issa|Kobayashi Issa]], a haiku poet (died [[:en:1827|1827]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] {{ill|June 12|de|June 12|ja|June 12|zh|June 12|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 12|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takano Chōei|Takano Nagahide]], a Rangaku scholar (died [[:en:1850|1850]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Saihei Hirose|Hirose Sahei]], a businessperson (died [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Shūsaku|Honinbō Shūsaku]], a professional Go player (died [[:en:1862|1862]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1835|1835]] {{ill|May 31|de|May 31|ja|May 31|zh|May 31|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May 31|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], vice-commander of the Shinsengumi (died [[:en:1869|1869]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1680|1680]] {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hayashi Gahō|Hayashi Gahō]] (Shunsai), a Zhu Xi scholar and son of Hayashi Rinsan (born [[:en:1618|1618]]). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] {{ill|June 8|de|June 8|ja|June 8|zh|June 8|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Reizei Tamechika|Reisui Iguyasu]], an imperial court painter. == Commemorations == * [[:en:Dragon Boat Festival|Dragon Boat Festival]] – The Dragon Boat Festival is celebrated. * Duanwu Festival (端午節) is observed in Taiwan. <ref>{{Cite web|url=http://jp.taiwantoday.tw/news.php?unit=151&post=115869|title=TAIWAN TODAY日本語版からのお知らせ|publisher=Taiwan Today|accessdate=2017-05-26|qq=}}</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:5-ngie̍t 5-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:5月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初五]][[zh:五月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:5-ngie̍t 5-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:5月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初五]][[zh:五月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:5-ngie̍t 5-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:5月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初五]][[zh:五月初五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839531]] Wikidata name: 5th day of the 5th month in the Chinese lunar calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 5|qq=May 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gendoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331}} {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – In the rebellion known as {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō no Ran}}, the reattempted anti-bakufu plot of Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo}} was leaked to the Ashikaga Shogunate, resulting in the arrest of figures such as {{ill|Hino Toshiki|de|日野俊基|ja|日野俊基|zh|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. The emperor then took refuge on 【Oki Province†Oki_Province】. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615}} {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} set out from Kyoto (from Nijō Castle) in preparation for the summer siege of Osaka. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenmei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1786|en|1786|WD=Q7760|lt=1786}} June 1) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the official {{ill|Mogami Tokunai|en|Mogami Tokunai|WD=Q4141812|lt=Mogami Tokunai}} landed on Ezo (specifically, on Etoroshima, also known as Etoroshima in Oki Province). == Births == * {{ill|Jōgan|en|Jōgan|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|867|en|867|WD=Q30347|lt=867}} {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gendoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331}} {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – In the rebellion known as {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō no Ran}}, the reattempted anti-bakufu plot of Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo}} was leaked to the Ashikaga Shogunate, resulting in the arrest of figures such as {{ill|Hino Toshiki|de|日野俊基|ja|日野俊基|zh|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. The emperor then took refuge on 【Oki Province†Oki_Province】. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615}} {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} set out from Kyoto (from Nijō Castle) in preparation for the summer siege of Osaka. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenmei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1786|en|1786|WD=Q7760|lt=1786}} June 1) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the official {{ill|Mogami Tokunai|en|Mogami Tokunai|WD=Q4141812|lt=Mogami Tokunai}} landed on Ezo (specifically, on Etoroshima, also known as Etoroshima in Oki Province). == Births == * {{ill|Jōgan|en|Jōgan|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan}} 9th year {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gendoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331}} {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – In the rebellion known as {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō no Ran}}, the reattempted anti-bakufu plot of Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo}} was leaked to the Ashikaga Shogunate, resulting in the arrest of figures such as {{ill|Hino Toshiki|de|日野俊基|ja|日野俊基|zh|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. The emperor then took refuge on 【Oki Province†Oki_Province】. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615}} {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} set out from Kyoto (from Nijō Castle) in preparation for the summer siege of Osaka. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenmei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1786|en|1786|WD=Q7760|lt=1786}} June 1) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the official {{ill|Mogami Tokunai|en|Mogami Tokunai|WD=Q4141812|lt=Mogami Tokunai}} landed on Ezo (specifically, on Etoroshima, also known as Etoroshima in Oki Province). == Births == * {{ill|Jōgan|en|Jōgan|WD=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan}} 9th year == Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gendoku|1=Gentoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331|1=1331}} {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – In the rebellion known as {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō no Ran|1=Genkō War}}, the reattempted anti-bakufu plot of Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}} was leaked to the Ashikaga Shogunate, resulting in the arrest of figures such as {{ill|Hino Toshiki|de|日野俊基|ja|日野俊基|zh|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. == Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gendoku|1=Gentoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331|1=1331}} {{ill|June 10|de|June 10|ja|June 10|zh|June 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 10|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – In the rebellion known as {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō no Ran|1=Genkō War}}, the reattempted anti-bakufu plot of Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}} was leaked to the Ashikaga Shogunate, resulting in the arrest of figures such as {{ill|Hino Toshiki|de|日野俊基|ja|日野俊基|zh|日野俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. The emperor then took refuge on 【Oki Province†Oki_Province】. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} set out from Kyoto (from Nijō Castle) in preparation for the summer siege of Osaka. * The emperor then took refuge on 【Oki Province†Oki_Province】. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|June 1|de|June 1|ja|June 1|zh|June 1|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} set out from Kyoto (from Nijō Castle) in preparation for the summer siege of Osaka. *
